name: Elena Garcia
summary: Mid-level Data Scientist with 5 years of experience in developing and deploying machine learning models to solve complex business problems. Proven ability to translate data insights into actionable strategies and drive measurable improvements in key performance indicators. Seeking to leverage expertise in predictive modeling and data analysis in a challenging new role.

experience.title: Data Scientist
experience.description: Developed and implemented machine learning models for customer churn prediction and personalized recommendation systems, resulting in a 15% reduction in churn and a 10% increase in user engagement. Collaborated with cross-functional teams to define project requirements and deliver data-driven solutions. Utilized Python, SQL, and scikit-learn for data manipulation, analysis, and model building.

experience.title: Junior Data Scientist
experience.description: Assisted senior data scientists in data cleaning, feature engineering, and model evaluation. Performed exploratory data analysis to identify trends and patterns. Contributed to the development of dashboards and reports for business stakeholders using Tableau and Python. Gained experience with statistical modeling and data visualization techniques.

experience.title: Data Analyst Intern
experience.description: Supported the data analytics team by collecting and processing data from various sources. Created basic reports and visualizations to communicate findings. Learned foundational concepts of data analysis and SQL querying.
